referenceObject.reference: Jäger, P. & Minn, M. Z. (2015). New species in the family Ctenidae Keyserling, 1877 from high altitude habitats in Myanmar, with the first case of penetration of the female's cuticle by a male in the RTA-clade (Arachnida: Araneae: Ctenidae). Zootaxa 3994(2): 235-252. doi: 10.11646/zootaxa.3994.2.4
